trustSubtitle: This project wants to use the AI agent
trustWarning: Untrusted projects can contain malicious code. Only trust projects from sources you know.
chooseMode: Choose how the agent handles tool calls in this project:
askSummary: The agent will ask for permission before running commands. When you approve, your choices are saved to .claude/settings.local.json for future sessions.
askBullet1: Approve once or always for each tool pattern
askBullet2: Fine-grained control - allow "npm test" but block "rm -rf"
askBullet3: Permissions shared with Claude Code CLI in this project
allowEditsSummary: The agent will run all file and edit operations without asking. Shell commands and web requests may still require approval.
allowEditsBullet1: All file read/write/edit operations are automatically approved
allowEditsBullet2: Bash commands and web fetches follow Claude Code's settings
allowEditsBullet3: Only use with projects you fully trust
allowAllSummary: The agent will run all operations without permission prompts, including shell commands, file operations, and web requests.
allowAllBullet1: All tool calls are automatically approved
allowAllBullet2: Uses Nimbalyst permissions instead of Claude Code settings
allowAllBullet3: Best for development and testing workflows
revokeConfirm:
Stop trusting "{{projectName}}"?

The AI agent won't run any tools in this workspace until you trust it again.
updateDeferredSessions: Active AI sessions detected, deferring install
standardModeDesc: Simplified interface focused on writing, editing, and AI assistance
developerModeDesc: Full development environment with git worktrees, terminal access, development specific features
referralQuestion: How did you hear about Nimbalyst?
aiDetailPlaceholder: What model and prompt did you use?
emailHelp: Receive occasional product updates and tips
emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
analyticsDisclaimer: We collect usage data to improve Nimbalyst. No prompts or content is ever collected. You can opt out of analytics any time in Settings.
legalText: By continuing, you agree to our
